top_signals.title: Saudi Central Bank Said to Pull Money From at Least Two Managers
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia’s monetary authority has pulled billions of dollars from at least two global asset managers in recent months, in a sign that the custodian of one of the world’s deepest pools of capital is growing more selective with deployment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Alan Greenspan, longtime U.S. Federal Reserve chairman, dies at 100
top_signals.summary: Greenspan died at his home from complications of Parkinson's Disease.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy buys another 520 BTC for $35 million, adds to USD reserve despite STRC slide
top_signals.summary: Strategy's total holdings account for more than 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth around $55 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Much Ado About Nothing at the Globe: A silly, frilly production
top_signals.summary: This production of Much Ado at Shakespeare's Globe is all light, no shade; it's up to you if you really care, writes Anna Moloney.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
